context: Tests whether the agent performs a complete App Store review readiness audit using current build, privacy, tracking, subscription, screenshot, and reviewer-access guidance.

checklist.name: Current SDK requirement
checklist.description: States that current uploads after the relevant 2026 deadline require Xcode 26 or later and the relevant platform SDK 26 or later.

checklist.name: ATT tracking
checklist.description: Explains that cross-app or cross-website ad tracking requires ATT, a clear tracking usage description, and no tracking before authorization.

checklist.name: SDK manifests
checklist.description: Checks whether third-party SDK code that collects data, uses required-reason APIs, enables data collection, or contacts tracking domains has its own privacy manifest in the bundle containing that code.

checklist.name: Privacy consistency
checklist.description: Requires privacy manifest declarations, App Store privacy labels, privacy policy, SDK behavior, and runtime behavior to agree.

checklist.name: Subscription rules
checklist.description: Warns that digital subscriptions generally require StoreKit IAP, visible price/duration/renewal/trial terms, working restore purchases, and no external purchase path unless current rules or entitlements allow it.

checklist.name: Screenshot sizes
checklist.description: Includes current iPhone and iPad screenshot compliance, specifically 6.9-inch iPhone screenshots and 13-inch iPad screenshots when the app runs on iPad.

checklist.name: Reviewer access
checklist.description: Requires demo credentials or demo mode and clear App Review notes for login-gated or non-obvious features.
